rules.checklist_item: Identify every device (physical/virtual) impacting BES; document impact ratings and system boundaries.
Define ESP boundaries; implement layered zones in control centers; monitor and control all ingress/egress points.
Disable unnecessary services; change default credentials; enforce least-privilege on all BES devices.
Document, test, and deploy vendor patches; implement mitigation plans for systems that cannot be patched (e.g., PLCs).
Develop response plans; coordinate with E-ISAC for threat intelligence; conduct annual drills and tabletop exercises.
Maintain baseline configurations; perform vulnerability assessments every 15 months; track all deviations with audit trails.
Vet suppliers; validate software authenticity; mandate security notification clauses in vendor contracts.
